purpose: Test error scratchpad (write delta not state) on v0.5.3
notes: KILL: early noise from meaningless deltas. Late steps 2.2x better but overall BPT worse.

purpose: Test pheromone-style decaying scalar trace in router
notes: KILL: marginal BPT but best late-step value. Pheromone trace needs time to accumulate.

purpose: Test depth-drop bootstrap (random truncation + KL to teacher)
notes: KILL: KL to teacher diverged to NaN at step 169. Numerically unstable at dim=128.

purpose: Test Grokfast gradient EMA filter (alpha=0.95, lambda=2.0)
notes: STRONG PASS: +11.0% BPT. Benefit grows with training steps. 5 lines of code.
KILL: lambda=5.0 too aggressive, caused NaN divergence.

purpose: Test Peri-LN (pre+post LayerNorm on each sublayer)
notes: PASS: +2.6% BPT with fewer params. Zero-cost normalization. Already in OLMo2/Gemma2/Gemma3.
Winner: v0.5.4+Grokfast (+13.6%). Surprise Bank KILLED (hurts all arms). Peri-LN+Pheromone=+5.9%.

purpose: True optimal: Peri-LN + Pheromone + Grokfast (no Surprise Bank)
notes: TRUE OPTIMAL: +15.9% BPT. Removing Surprise Bank drag gained extra 2.3pp over ablation best.
FAIL: OOM at 49.5% (4.32B tokens). Python list accumulation ~70GB RAM. Fixed with shard-based writes.

purpose: Tokenize FineWeb-Edu with shard-based disk writes
notes: RUNNING: shard-based, peak RAM ~4GB, writes every 200 chunks. Restart from scratch.

purpose: Trace which parameters each v0.6.0a loss term updates before re-launching dense-12 training
command: inline python gradient audit of L_final/L_step/L_probe on code/launch_v060a.py + code/train_v060a.py
notes: Confirmed detached-history split: L_final updates recurrent core + readout, L_step updates only final LN + tied embeddings, L_probe updates only gain_probe. Used to set conservative dense-12 stability hyperparameters.

purpose: 2-arm L_step ablation: baseline (sampled CE) vs no L_step
notes: Sampled L_step is BENEFICIAL. Without it, late improvement drops 19% (13.5→11.0) and best pass shifts from 11→10. Goldilocks zone: weak imprecise prediction signal keeps intermediate passes engaged.

purpose: Generation quality test across 15 diverse prompts at step 9000
notes: Severe repetition in greedy decoding (trigram_div=0.265). Model loops within 10-20 tokens. No factual knowledge. Expected at 68M/9K steps. Dominant failure is state-level attractor collapse in recurrent processing.

purpose: 3-arm L_step probe: baseline (sampled) vs exact (full-vocab CE on passes 7-10) vs none
notes: DEFINITIVE: Sampled L_step is Goldilocks zone. Exact CE causes catastrophic pass convergence (passes 8-11 all produce BPT ~9.2, best pass shifts from 11→9). No L_step causes gradual degradation. Current production config is correct.
BPT still monotonically improving. Power law predicted 7.38, actual 7.49 (slightly worse). Improvement 9K→10K = 0.052 BPT.
